stemHtml: ATC: “Fastair 345, cross runway 28 L, taxi to holding point B2, hold short of runway 28 R.” What is the correct read back?

options.a: Cross runway 28 L, taxi to holding point B2, hold short of runway 28 R, Fastair 345
options.b: Taxi to holding point runway 28 R, Fastair 345
options.c: Cross runway 28 L to hold short runway 28 R, Fastair 345
options.d: Fastair 345, taxi to holding point B2
